backlog.title: Fix E402 lint errors in skill_executor.py (pre-existing import ordering)
backlog.description: backend/apps/ai/processing/skill_executor.py has 3 E402 (module level import not at top of file) errors at lines 50-56. These block lint-gated deploy for any change to this file. The imports are after a large block of other imports and comments — need to restructure the file to fix.

backlog.title: Fix pre-existing ESLint crash (ajv/eslintrc TypeError on defaultMeta)
backlog.description: ESLint 9.35.0 crashes with 'Cannot set properties of undefined (setting defaultMeta)' due to @eslint/eslintrc ajv version conflict. This blocks sessions.py deploy without --no-verify. Pre-existing issue, not introduced by recent changes.

backlog.title: ESLint not configured/installed in CLI package
backlog.description: ESLint not installed or incomplete in frontend/packages/openmates-cli or repo root. Run pnpm install from repo root to fix.

backlog.title: Pre-commit hook fails on () check with no () calls in staged files
backlog.description: The pre-commit translation key hook fails even when staged Svelte files contain no $text() calls. Likely a false positive in the check script.

backlog.title: Fix ESLint/ajv crash in pre-commit hook
backlog.description: ESLint 9.35.0 crashes with 'TypeError: Cannot set properties of undefined (setting defaultMeta)' caused by @eslint/eslintrc incompatibility with ajv override. The pnpm override 'ajv: ^8.18.0' conflicts with @eslint/eslintrc's internal ajv usage.

backlog.title: Pre-commit hook bypassed in session 41bc: test: add unit tests for postprocessor, preprocessor, external sanitizer, activeChatStore, draftSave, and shareEncryption
backlog.description: Deploy used --no-verify to bypass a pre-commit hook failure. Investigate and fix the hook.

backlog.title: Fix ESLint 9.35.0 compatibility issue (ajv defaultMeta crash)
backlog.description: ESLint crashes with 'Cannot set properties of undefined (setting defaultMeta)' when linting TS files in __tests__ dirs. Pre-existing bug in @eslint/eslintrc ESLint 9.x compatibility layer. Blocked commit hooks for TS test files.
